title: Flint and Steel+
description: Adds a better flint and steel to the game
body:
# Flint & Steel+ *This is a plugin that adds a better flint and steel to the game* ## Flint & Steel+ Recipe The recipe for a Flint & Steel+ is just 1 Iron block and 1 Flint in any order, or shape. This recipe can not be modified in the config
![Here is an image of 1 iron block and some flint inside a crafting table](https://bluenightfury46.dev/papermc/FlintAndSteelRecipe.png) ## Blue fire If ```soul-flame``` is enabled in the config.yml, soul fire will be spawned instead of regular fire. Please note that this also spawns in soul sand blocks below that **can** be mined
![Below is an image of Blue soul flame in a square shape](https://bluenightfury46.dev/papermc/soul_fire.png) ## Config ``` flame-radius: 6 # Below is the flint and steel cooldown in seconds, accepts a decimal valie cooldown: 0.5 soul-flame: false # Whether, or not to give the player fire resistence for a certain period of time after using the flint and steel give-fire-resistence: true # The duration of the fire resistence that gets applied if give-fire-resistence is true (in seconds, does not accept a decimal answer) fire-resistence-duration: 10 ```
